GLOBAL_DESIGN_SYSTEM.pipeline_objective: Ingest flat, parsed static website data and systematically up-level it into a spatial, 3D dynamic experience featuring premium cinematic motion and layout restraint.

3D_spatial_rules.camera_rig: Enforce a controlled WebGL/Three.js perspective camera matrix. Prevent the user from completely flipping the scene; restrict viewing angles to subtle parallax shifts.
3D_spatial_rules.depth_layers_z_axis: Assign explicit Z-index/depth layers. Background environments live at Z: -50, floating 3D ambient objects live at Z: -10 to -5, typography planes sit strictly at Z: 0 for crisp legibility, and cursor micro-interactions trigger a +2 forward pull.
3D_spatial_rules.asset_optimization: All 3D models or particle meshes must use optimized glTF/glb formats with compression to ensure instantaneous rendering, avoiding low-end performance stutter.

rejection_triggers: No scattered elements or mismatched fonts/spacing (screams cheap, generic templates).
No auto-playing sliders or random, unconstrained 3D visual gimmicks that serve no narrative purpose.
Avoid over-indexing on messy source data; filter aggressively for layouts with a $5k–$10k premium valuation structure.

premium_benchmarks.margins_and_alignment: Generous margins, perfectly clean alignment, and sharp visual contrast.
premium_benchmarks.typography: Highly restricted, archetype-specific typography (e.g., sophisticated Serifs for luxury/legal, precise Sans-Serifs for modern tech).

hierarchy_and_legibility_rules.sequential_gaze: Force the eye to move in a strict, uncrowded sequence: Huge Bold Element (Primary) -> Medium Text (Secondary) -> Tiny Action/Date (Tertiary).
hierarchy_and_legibility_rules.digital_silence: Enforce heavy, deliberate white space/negative space between sections to separate colored panels and act as a visual pause to reduce cognitive load.
hierarchy_and_legibility_rules.text_overlay_legibility: When a 3D environment or background asset looks visually busy, dynamically inject a translucent overlay to guarantee typography remains flawlessly readable.

motion_and_interaction_rules.intentional_motion: Motion is never a random decoration. It must guide the eye, build atmosphere, and support the brand's core story.
motion_and_interaction_rules.scroll_linked_pacing: Sync 3D mesh rotations, scales, and camera translations directly to scroll progress using scroll-linked libraries (e.g., GSAP ScrollTrigger), moving fluidly with the user.
motion_and_interaction_rules.staggered_reveal_delay: Enforce micro-delays on sequential lines of text. Elements must fade in or glide up from black-to-gray transitions rather than appearing all at once, controlling the reading pace.
motion_and_interaction_rules.restrained_hovers: Hover interactions over 3D coordinates or UI elements must remain minimal, subtle, and restrained to protect the luxury aesthetic.
motion_and_interaction_rules.micro_acknowledgments: Every hover/click must trigger a subtle micro-interaction (button color shift, minor jiggle, text underline slide) so the site feels responsive and alive.

1_HeroSection.story_role: The Mood Setter. Focuses visitor attention completely, sets emotional expectations, and states the core value proposition cleanly without clutter.
structural_layout: A full-screen interactive 3D canvas background (e.g., particle field or ambient mesh) moving slower than the typography on scroll (parallax effect).
A minimal, small logo paired with a hyper-clean, restricted top navigation bar.
A massive, bold headline centered over the canvas with a short supporting tagline line.
A singular, isolated primary CTA button to keep the immediate focus entirely clear.
An anchored, floating scroll-linked 3D object that tracks scroll progress downward to seamlessly connect to the next section.

inputs_extracted_from_static_site.logoAssetURL: Path to the parsed brand mark.
inputs_extracted_from_static_site.heroHeadline: The main, high-impact text line summarizing the core corporate value or goal.
inputs_extracted_from_static_site.heroSubheading: The concise supporting statement setting the brand's tone.
inputs_extracted_from_static_site.ctaText: Action text for the singular focus button (e.g., 'Explore Now').

2_CollageIntroduction.story_role: The Humanizer. Transitions the user from broad hero appeal into a personal narrative, adding character and hinting at brand diversity.
structural_layout: A central, elegant text block consisting of exactly one powerful sentence explaining who the brand is and why they exist.
Surrounded by a small, tightly curated collage of contextual photos framing the text.
Images must slightly overlap the text layout to introduce an intentional human imperfection and sense of depth.

inputs_extracted_from_static_site.introStatement: A single, memorable sentence outlining corporate purpose and existence.
inputs_extracted_from_static_site.collageImages: An array of 3 to 4 distinct image URLs representing the brand's personality.

3_StaticOfferingsGrid.story_role: The Offerings. Presents core services or products clearly at a single glance, relying on a clean static layout instead of distracting sliders.
structural_layout: A structured, uniform grid composed of 3 static cards (or replicated into a clean 4-card / multi-row block if content dictates).
Consistent panel sizing across all elements to entirely eliminate visual chaos.
Each card is hard-coded to contain an image, a clear title, and a highly concise description.

inputs_extracted_from_static_site.gridItems: An array of objects (minimum 3), each containing 'title', 'shortDescription', and 'imageURL'.

4_TwoColumnValuePause.story_role: The Trust Builder. Acts as a visual pause or 'digital breath' on the page, focusing entirely on philosophical connection rather than a sales conversion.
structural_layout: A strict two-column asymmetrical split layout.
Left Column: A bold, memorable philosophical statement, followed by a short paragraph adding deep context.
Right Column: A singular, high-quality image that directly illustrates the philosophy.
Optional: A secondary, low-friction button ('Learn More' or 'Discover') that remains strictly non-mandatory.

inputs_extracted_from_static_site.philosophyHeadline: A bold, memorable statement about the company's process or philosophy.
inputs_extracted_from_static_site.philosophyDeepDive: A short, high-trust paragraph adding depth to the headline.
inputs_extracted_from_static_site.illustrativeImageAsset: A realistic image URL matching the conceptual narrative.

5_ClosingCallToAction.story_role: The Closer. Leaves the visitor with an incredibly clean, uncluttered final choice to solidify their conversion journey.
structural_layout: A full-width, immersive static photo background or ultra-smooth cinematic 3D video environment.
A completely centered, simple typography stack featuring a strong, highly inviting headline.
A single, clean supporting reassurance sentence positioned directly underneath.
One massive, singular, unmistakable conversion button.

inputs_extracted_from_static_site.closingHeadline: A powerful final invitation (e.g., 'Let's Build Something Together').
inputs_extracted_from_static_site.closingSupportText: A final reassurance sentence to anchor the value.
